name: Avatar Speaker
description: Turn text into natural-sounding voice-over (TTS); reserves a digital-human avatar skeleton for future one-click talking-head synthesis. Designed for users who don't know how to use voice-over software.

description_i18n.zh: 把一段文字变成自然好听的配音 (TTS)；预留数字人形象骨架，后续可一键合成「会说话的头像」。专为不会用配音软件的小白。
description_i18n.en: Turn text into natural-sounding voice-over (TTS); reserves a digital-human avatar skeleton for future one-click talking-head synthesis. Designed for users who don't know how to use voice-over software.

author: OpenAkita
